# phala_workspace (Data Source)

Returns the active workspace info for the current API key.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `avatar` (String)
- `id` (String) Workspace ID.
- `name` (String)
- `role` (String)
- `slug` (String)
- `tier` (String)
